name: @tessyl/id
description: Pure Voyd UUIDv7 and human-readable word ID generation.

scripts.build: node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./src --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests && node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./test --pkg-dir ../.. --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests
scripts.lint: node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./src --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests && node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./test --pkg-dir ../.. --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests
scripts.typecheck: node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./src --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests && node ../../.voyd-source/apps/cli/bin/voyd.js test ./test --pkg-dir ../.. --reporter silent --fail-empty-tests
